brand.name: Template Preview
brand.tagline: This is the Rebel Alliance agent-site-template

hero.headline: Finally, a Website That Works as Hard as You Do
hero.problem: Most small business websites look outdated and fail to convert visitors into customers.
hero.sub: We build high-converting sites for local businesses — so you wake up to booked appointments, not a silent phone.

services.name: Custom Site Design
services.description: A site built around your business, not a generic template.

services.name: Local SEO Setup
services.description: Show up when customers in your area search for what you offer.

services.name: Speed & Performance
services.description: Fast on mobile, beautiful on desktop — no compromises.

guide.headline: We Know How Frustrating a Bad Website Can Be
guide.empathy: You've worked hard to build your business. The last thing you need is a website that sends customers to your competitor.
guide.authority: We've built sites for 200+ local businesses and know exactly what drives calls, bookings, and walk-ins.

steps.title: Tell Us About Your Business
steps.description: We ask a few questions about your services, customers, and what makes you different.

steps.title: We Build Your Site
steps.description: In 24 hours, you get a custom site with your branding, copy, and local SEO built in.

steps.title: You Start Getting Calls
steps.description: Go live, share the link, and watch inquiries come in from customers who are ready to book.

seo.title: Template Preview — Rebel Alliance
seo.description: agent-site-template: Next.js 15 + Tailwind v4 + shadcn/ui. Single-file site.json contract.
